name: shadowssh
description: ShadowSSH monorepo for the lightweight web SSH client.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace packages/backend
scripts.docker:build:frontend: docker buildx build --platform linux/arm64 -f packages/frontend/Dockerfile -t shadowssh-frontend:arm64-alpine --load .
scripts.docker:build:backend: docker buildx build --platform linux/arm64 -f packages/backend/Dockerfile -t shadowssh-backend:arm64-alpine --load .
